# Grecia Group

> A sanctuary for Spanish-speaking caregivers. Grecia Group creates original musical films (Tender Heart Rhythms) for people caring for aging or ill loved ones. Founded by Roxana Grecia, who cared for her father in his final 15 days and now cares for her mother.

## What this is
Grecia Group turns the invisible labor and grief of caregiving into original Spanish-language songs set to real family photographs, distributed as short cinematic "memory films." The mission is to make caregivers feel seen, build a community, and offer resources that help.

## Key pages
- [Inicio (Spanish)](https://greciagroup.com/): the films, the story, and the free gift for caregivers.
- [Home (English)](https://greciagroup.com/en/): English version of the same.

## The films
Six original songs: Mi Heroe Mi Pilar, Tu Mano en la Mia, Papa ya no se quien soy, Cuidarte es Salvarme, Tu Sonrisa en la Niebla, Mi Libertad en tus Ojos.

## Products
Spiritual and affirmation resources for caregivers, available on Etsy (shop: GreciaGroup).

## Contact
rox@greciagroup.com
